creator: ahd@kew.com
text:
In attempting to locate the ports collection on the 2.2.6
	CD-ROM collection, inspection of the CD-ROM labels and
	coversheets reveal a failure to provide even a one-line
	summary of the each CD-ROM contents.  This makes handling
	the CD-ROM's unfriendly under FreeBSD, since it
	insert/mount/browse/umount/remove is a lengthy process and
	requires root access for the mount/umount sequence.

	The existing comment "Please see README.TXT" doesn't cut
	it with a collection this large, to examine all four disks
	requires a total of 20 steps.

Fix: 

Provide reasonable summary one line summary of actual
	contents of disk on each label, and also in the booklet.
	Booklet summary of disk contents should be slightly longer, if
	needed.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Open CD-ROM package.  Examine disks for contents.  Start
	mounting.
